context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements frequency capping with localStorage, targeting rules (login check, checkout exclusion, time-on-page, already-subscribed), and GDPR-compliant popup UI with correct aria attributes.

checklist.name: localStorage frequency key format
checklist.description: Frequency capping uses localStorage with key format popup_seen_${popupId} (template literal with popup ID)

checklist.name: Dismiss sets dismissed flag
checklist.description: On explicit dismiss, also writes popup_dismissed_${popupId} key to localStorage (separate from the seen key)

checklist.name: Frequency cap duration
checklist.description: Frequency cap suppresses the popup for at least 14 days (not less)

checklist.name: Logged-in customer exclusion
checklist.description: Checks document.cookie for 'customer_id=' to exclude already logged-in customers

checklist.name: Checkout page exclusion
checklist.description: Excludes pages where window.location.pathname starts with '/checkout'

checklist.name: Time on page minimum
checklist.description: Requires at least 30000ms (30 seconds) time on page before showing the popup

checklist.name: Existing subscriber exclusion
checklist.description: Checks for a subscriber_id cookie or localStorage flag to exclude already-subscribed visitors

checklist.name: Popup dialog role
checklist.description: Popup container element has role='dialog' and aria-modal='true'

checklist.name: Consent checkbox not pre-checked
checklist.description: The email consent checkbox does NOT have defaultChecked or checked={true} — it starts unchecked

checklist.name: Consent checkbox required
checklist.description: The consent checkbox has the 'required' attribute so the form cannot be submitted without checking it

checklist.name: Offer type support
checklist.description: The popup component handles at least two of: 'percent_off', 'free_shipping', 'free_gift' offer types
